articles.title: 35 heat-related illness calls since July 1 prompt warnings as summer heat persists - KOKH
articles.search_term: (heatstroke OR "heat stroke" OR sunstroke OR "heat exhaustion" OR "heat-related death" OR "heat casualty" OR "heat fatality" OR "suspected heat death" OR dehydration OR "heat cramps" OR "heat illness") Chhattisgarh
articles.full_text:
35 heat-related illness calls since July 1 prompt warnings as summer heat persists
Medics stress that if you are spending time outdoors, you need to prepare for the heat.
Also, wear light-colored, loose-fitting clothing and take plenty of breaks in the shade.
